name: Terracom Limited
analysis: TER's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0780, stop A$0.0693, target A$0.0890 (1.26:1) — then trail it.
